creator: mi@kot.ne.mediaone.net
text:
The share/locale/*/LC_MESSAGES/lyx.mo files listed in pkg/PLIST
	are never installed.

Fix: 

See How-To-Repeat for work-around.
How-To-Repeat: 
	May be, this is related to me having libintl installed separately,
	but for me, the language files did not get installed. Besides making
	lyx mono-lingual, this breaks making a package.
	Going to ${WRKSRC}/po and making ``install'' put them into
	/usr/local/lib/locale, from where I had to move them into share --
	``make package'' worked after that.
